calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
